_comment: Active research state for Auto Audio Depth Estimation. One study = one structural hypothesis and its HPO/confirmation progression. When a study concludes, append a PASS/FAIL row to hypotheses.tsv, update archive.json, then open the next study. Adaptive-HPO ladder: structural-screen -> 3 -> 5 -> 7 -> 10, each extension justified by evidence. Never crown on <2-3 confirming draws (S10/E125 lesson).
global_champion_note: NEW CHAMPION (S19): 10ch multi-resolution STFT (n_fft 512+128) + TTA, 3-draw mean 2.0639. Old TTA 5ch (494b5e2, 2.082) demoted to lineage champion. To revert to a 5ch experiment: set prepare.FEATURE_FN=None + in_ch=5.

concluded_studies.note: Fine-block n_fft sweep {64:2.0652 tied, 128:2.064 best, 256:2.0815 worse}. n_fft=128 optimal; the win is fine-TIME resolution (echo timing), frequency not the lever. Champion unchanged 828b9a3.
5th TTA draw E135=2.0796; 5-draw mean 2.0821 +-0.0075. Champion robustly settled. Holding action; operator then approved PROPOSAL-01.

Early/late waveform-split 10ch (E136=2.1247) is +0.043 worse: splitting the waveform truncates each STFT and the baseline STFT time-axis already carries echo timing. Temporal axis not the bottleneck. PROPOSAL-01 seam works.

Multi-resolution STFT (n_fft 512+128) 10ch. 3 draws E137/E138/E139 mean 2.0639 +-0.004, all below old champion best draw 2.072. Fine-time echo-delay resolution adds real depth signal (ABS_REL+d1 up, RMSE tied). First gain beyond the architecture ceiling. Commit 828b9a3.
L/R-equivariance training is redundant with the free eval-time TTA and costs an anneal epoch (E131 budget-bust; E132 comp 2.0925 > champion 2.079). See hypotheses.tsv.
4th TTA draw E133=2.0935; 4-draw mean 2.0827 +-0.008, ~2 sigma below old baseline 2.099. Champion settled.

Confidence-weighted TTA (E134=2.0966) is worse than uniform 50/50 (2.083); uniform is near-optimal for two symmetric views, learned per-pixel confidence is noisy on held-out scenes. TTA blend already optimal.

strategic_note: BREAKTHROUGH on the acoustic-representation axis (PROPOSAL-01, operator-approved & implemented). After the whole train.py architecture space was exhausted (S10/S13/S14/S16 FAILed; TTA 5ch settled at 2.082), the representation held the real signal: multi-resolution STFT (S19) is the NEW CHAMPION at 2.064 (commit 828b9a3). Now mining this productive axis: S20 tunes the fine-block resolution (E140 n_fft=64 tied 128); next explore a 3rd resolution scale / cross-channel coherence / per-band echo processing. The prepare.FEATURE_FN seam is the live research surface.

active_study.general_hypothesis: The multi-res champion spans two time-frequency scales (512 fine-freq + 128 fine-time). Room modes and wall materials leave fine SPECTRAL structure that a longer analysis window resolves better than n_fft=512; adding a third, longest-window scale may capture room/material cues the current two scales miss.
active_study.detailed_hypothesis: Add a third 5ch block at n_fft=1024 (longest window -> finest FREQUENCY, ~21ms) on top of the 512+128 champion -> 15ch, testing whether more of the time-frequency plane (finer freq / room-mode detail) adds depth signal beyond the two-scale champion.
active_study.experiment_note: E142: prepare.FEATURE_FN=multires3_feat (ds._specN 512 + _feat5_at 128 + _feat5_at 1024) -> 15ch; cfg.dataset.in_ch=15; swap_lr_multi handles 15 (3 blocks).
open_risks: The fine-block sweep showed frequency is NOT the lever (256 worse), so a finer-freq 3rd block may be neutral/redundant with the 512 block; screen honestly vs 2.064.
15ch grows the first conv slightly; negligible.
active_study.decision_rule: Screen vs champion 2.064. Clearly better (<2.058) + replicates -> new champion (3-scale). Within noise (2.060-2.068) -> the third scale is redundant, two scales suffice; conclude, keep 828b9a3, and EXPLORE a qualitatively-NEW cue next (cross-channel coherence / direct-vs-diffuse) rather than more resolution. Worse -> the extra block dilutes; drop it.

backlog.idea: 3rd resolution scale: add a very-long-window block (n_fft=1024, fine frequency for room modes / material) as a 3rd 5ch block -> 15ch, on top of the 512+128 champion. Tests whether more of the time-frequency plane helps.
Cross-channel coherence: add magnitude-squared coherence |E[L conj(R)]|^2 / (E|L|^2 E|R|^2) per TF bin as an extra channel - a direct-vs-diffuse / direct-path-strength cue distinct from ILD/IPD.
Per-frequency-band echo processing / learned STFT front-end (small conv on the complex STFT before the 5ch reduction).
The TTA + multi-res champion could get more confirmation draws if a future decision hinges on the exact mean.
